args: from gateway.mcp.context import mcp_user_id_var, mcp_org_id_var, mcp_raw_key_var, mcp_client_ip_var, mcp_user_agent_var; mcp_user_id_var.set('local'); mcp_org_id_var.set('local'); mcp_raw_key_var.set(None); mcp_client_ip_var.set('127.0.0.1'); mcp_user_agent_var.set('benchmark-runner'); from gateway.mcp import main; main()
